mapper.select: SELECT * FROM schedule WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM schedule_detail WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY day_number ASC
SELECT * FROM schedule_image WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY is_thumbnail DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule ( user_id, title, description, category, region, chat_link, start_date, end_date, recruit_start_date, recruit_end_date, min_participants, max_participants, current_participants, age_min, age_max, gender_limit, total_price, cost_type, thumbnail_image, view_count, status, is_public, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{region}, #{chatLink}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{recruitStartDate}, #{recruitEndDate}, #{minParticipants}, #{maxParticipants}, 1, #{ageMin}, #{ageMax}, #{genderLimit}, #{totalPrice}, #{costType}, #{thumbnailImage}, 0, 'recruiting', 1, NOW() )

INSERT INTO schedule_detail ( schedule_id, day_number, title, description, created_at ) VALUES
( #{scheduleId}, #{item.dayNumber}, #{item.title}, #{item.description}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO schedule_image ( schedule_id, image_url, is_thumbnail, created_at ) VALUES
( #{scheduleId}, #{url}, CASE WHEN #{index} = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id, category, title, region, start_date, end_date, current_participants, max_participants, created_at FROM schedule
deleted_at IS NULL
AND category = #{category}
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY id DESC
